content: My brother Arjun was under immense stress in the last two weeks. He told me he had evidence of financial fraud in Vikas Mehta’s startup — money siphoned from a client trust account managed by Priya Sharma’s law firm. He said he was going to the police on March 18. He was scared. He didn’t tell me what the evidence was, but he showed me a folder labeled 'NexaPay Audit.' He was going to meet Vikas that evening to confront him. I didn’t know he was walking home. I found his phone at the scene. It was still on, last call was to me at 6:52 PM. I believe he was killed because he was going to expose them.
